name: Tzimmes Kugel
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Frozen orange juice concentrate, thawed
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease an 8"x8"x2-inch baking dish or a 2-1/2 quart baking dish.
Cut the apples and potatoes into chunks. Grate in a food processor fitted with a grater blade. Transfer to a large bowl and stir in lemon juice.
Change to a steel chopping blade (no need to wash the bowl). Cut the carrots and lemon into chunks and chop finely. Add to the apple potato mixture.
Stir in the raisins, 3 tablespoons of melted margarine, thawed orange juice concentrate, salt, cinnamon, sugar, and matzo meal; mix well.
Transfer to the prepared baking dish and drizzle remaining margarine over. Bake in the preheated oven for 1 hour or until browned and firm in center. Makes 8 to 10 servings. For pancakes, drop spoonfuls of mixture into 1/4-inch deep hot oil. Flatten slightly and fry until crisp and brown on both sides.
